steps.title: Identify the sentence's structural role
steps.content: The underlined sentence immediately follows the claim that other animals find tools helpful. It provides a specific, concrete instance to support that claim.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: The sentence provides a specific example (sea otters with anvil stones) illustrating that animals use tools. Choice B identifies this correctly—providing an example of tool use in a nonhuman animal. The other three either make unsupported comparisons (A, C) or miss what the sentence actually does (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
